strongest_signal.name: r65c_split_gap_p40
strongest_signal.signal: best split candidate r65c_split_gap_p40: gap=+0.40, fb=0.955, scd=0.555; dKg_xy Δ=1.297958, dKg_yy Δ=2.143841, dKa_xx Δ=1.265498, rx_y Δ=0.231398, dKg_xx Δ=0.697953, dKg_zz Δ=-0.534175, mean Δ=0.143415, max Δ=0.697953

interpretation: 在固定 dual-channel skeleton 与固定平均 floor 的前提下，当前最优 split point 落在 **偏 feedback 一侧（feedback 更放、SCD 更收）**；也就是说，这条轴上最好的结果对应 gap=+0.40，而不是盲目把 feedback 和 SCD 拉得越开越好。
next_best_move: Lock the best gap `+0.40` as center, then run one ultra-narrow local refinement on ±0.03 / ±0.06 only, or conclude that the split-point axis itself has saturated if even the best point remains clearly behind Round61.
conclusion_line: Round65-C found the best split point in this family, but it still does not cleanly beat Round61.
